name: hands
description: Yeetful Hands — the one-URL front door for external agents (Claude Desktop/Code, OpenClaw, any MCP client): scan a wallet's movable money across Base/Arbitrum/Ethereum, learn what Yeetful's guarded transaction layer can build, and mint the yeetful.com/sign handoff link where the human reviews and signs. Never returns calldata, artifacts, or addresses — the agent plans, the guarded builders rebuild, the human's wallet is the only signer.
